headline: 202 days behind—today your discipline starts
summary: You need 0.58kg weekly but average 0.39kg; today demands disciplined eating and non-negotiable exercise to begin catching up.
details: Eat only portioned Huel meals today—no snacking, no emotional eating as the weekend approaches. Hit the rowing machine for 45 minutes or treadmill for 60 minutes today. You're 202 days behind: every single day of discipline compounds; squandering today guarantees more catch-up pressure this weekend.
